narration_text: You need to hear this today: three simple tests to tell God's voice from your thoughts. Imagine two inner voices — one rushed, one calm. Test one: Scripture. Does the prompting line up with God's commands and character? Test two: inner peace and fruit. True guidance brings a steady peace and produces good fruit; it doesn't leave you in urgency or shame. Test three: community. Seek the perspective of a wise Christian. Pray, "Father, help me hear You clearly," then wait for all three to match — the Word, the peace, and the counsel — and remember: discernment is learned.
